workflow.name: Memcached HA existing
workflow.description: Bootstrap and validate Memcached HA from an existing automation runner and target inventory.

data.label: Prepare Memcached inventory
data.command:
set -euo pipefail
apt-get update
DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive apt-get install -y ansible sshpass
cat >/tmp/memcached-inventory.ini <<'INVENTORY'
[memcached]
10.31.120.11 role=cache name=memcached-01
10.31.120.12 role=cache name=memcached-02
10.31.120.13 role=cache name=memcached-03
INVENTORY

data.label: Install Memcached container runtime
data.command:
set -euo pipefail
cat >/tmp/memcached-runtime.yml <<'PLAYBOOK'
- hosts: memcached
  become: true
  tasks:
    - ansible.builtin.shell: |
        if command -v docker >/dev/null 2>&1; then
          docker --version
          exit 0
        fi
        if command -v apt-get >/dev/null 2>&1; then
          apt-get update
          DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive apt-get install -y docker.io docker-compose-plugin
        elif command -v dnf >/dev/null 2>&1; then
          dnf install -y docker docker-compose-plugin
        elif command -v yum >/dev/null 2>&1; then
          yum install -y docker docker-compose-plugin
        fi
        systemctl enable --now docker
PLAYBOOK
ansible-playbook -i /tmp/memcached-inventory.ini /tmp/memcached-runtime.yml

data.label: Render Memcached cluster manifests
data.command:
set -euo pipefail
cat >/tmp/memcached-deploy.yml <<'PLAYBOOK'
- hosts: memcached
  become: true
  tasks:
    - ansible.builtin.file:
        path: /opt/octastack/memcached
        state: directory
        mode: "0750"
    - ansible.builtin.copy:
        dest: /opt/octastack/memcached/compose.yml
        mode: "0640"
        content: |
          services:
            memcached:
              image: memcached:1.6
              container_name: octastack-memcached
              restart: unless-stopped
              command: "memcached -m 256"
              ports:
                - "11211:11211"
              volumes:
                - data:/tmp
          volumes:
            data: {}
PLAYBOOK

data.label: Deploy Memcached cluster
data.command:
set -euo pipefail
cat >>/tmp/memcached-deploy.yml <<'PLAYBOOK'
    - ansible.builtin.shell: docker compose -f /opt/octastack/memcached/compose.yml pull
    - ansible.builtin.shell: docker compose -f /opt/octastack/memcached/compose.yml up -d
    - ansible.builtin.shell: docker compose -f /opt/octastack/memcached/compose.yml ps
PLAYBOOK
ansible-playbook -i /tmp/memcached-inventory.ini /tmp/memcached-deploy.yml

data.label: Document Memcached topology
data.command:
set -euo pipefail
cat >/tmp/memcached-topology.md <<'EOF'
# Memcached HA topology

Members:
- memcached-01: 10.31.120.11 (cache)
- memcached-02: 10.31.120.12 (cache)
- memcached-03: 10.31.120.13 (cache)

This example deploys one Memcached container per member host. Replace the placeholder commands with vendor-supported clustering, TLS, backup, and failover automation before production use.
EOF
cat /tmp/memcached-topology.md

data.label: Validate Memcached cluster
data.command:
set -euo pipefail
ansible -i /tmp/memcached-inventory.ini memcached -b -m shell -a 'docker ps --format "{{.Names}} {{.Status}}"'

data.label: Memcached HA health check
data.command: docker exec octastack-memcached sh -lc 'echo version | nc 127.0.0.1 11211 || true'
